app.name: CliFM
app.one_liner: A shell-like, command-line terminal file manager that replaces GUI/TUI with direct CLI interaction for powerful file management.

screens.name: Main Command Interface
screens.purpose: Primary interface where users interact via typed commands to navigate, select, preview, and manipulate files.
primary_actions: execute file operations (copy, move, delete, open)
invoke plugins or built-in tools (e.g., fzf, chafa)

rust_commands.name: list_items
rust_commands.purpose: Enumerate files in the current directory with optional filters, tags, or previews.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persistently store a selected file or metadata (e.g., tags, bookmarks) to disk within the current profile.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core command parser mimicking clifm’s shell-like interface
week 1: Integrate basic file listing with selection state
acceptance_tests: Archive extraction via 'unzip' or 'bsdtar' backend succeeds without crashing
Selected files persist across sessions when saved under a named profile
User can type 'cd /tmp' and see updated file list from /tmp
